title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hyundai India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hyundai India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
